chunks.text: Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2019 - EECS at Berkeley Berkeley EECS Annual Research Symposium (BEARS) 2019 The Future of Medicine: An EECS Perspective February 14, 2019 Please join us for our annual symposium, which will focus on ho

s for our annual symposium, which will focus on how EECS research is changing the future of medicine. We will start with six broadly accessible lectures about these recent developments, followed by shorter talks by some of our graduate students on a

orter talks by some of our graduate students on a broader range of topics. Immediately after the program, several of our research centers will host visitors for poster sessions and discussions. We invite our industry partners, alumni, and friends to

ite our industry partners, alumni, and friends to join us for the day. Your attendance would be most welcome. 9 am – 3 pm Sibley Auditorium Bechtel Engineering Center University of California, Berkeley Berkeley, CA 94709 Map to Open House Centers and
